mapper.select:
SELECT sc.id, sc.sn_code AS snCode, sc.production_line AS productionLine, sc.offline_time AS offlineTime, sc.function_starttime AS functionStarttime, sc.function_endtime AS functionEndtime, sc.function_emp_name AS functionEmpName, sc.area, sc.create_time AS createTime, sc.update_time AS updateTime, cd.sn_h_code AS snHCode, cd.sn_l_code AS snLCode, cd.h_ncr_discription AS hNcrDiscription, cd.l_ncr_discription AS lNcrDiscription FROM fqc_switch_cabinet sc LEFT JOIN fqc_cabinet_detail cd ON sc.sn_code = cd.sn_code AND cd.is_deleted = 0
sc.is_deleted = 0
AND sc.sn_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.snCode}, '%')
AND sc.production_line LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.productionLine}, '%')
AND sc.area LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.area}, '%')
AND ( sc.sn_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.keywords}, '%') OR sc.production_line LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.keywords}, '%') OR sc.area LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.keywords}, '%') )
AND sc.offline_time >= #{startDate}
AND sc.offline_time <= #{endDate}
ORDER BY sc.offline_time ASC
